Container.Name: Gluetun-Full
Container.Overview:
Gluetun - VPN client in a thin Docker container for multiple VPN providers, written in Go, and using OpenVPN or Wireguard, DNS over TLS, with a few proxy servers built-in.
'Gluetun-Full' is an attempt to: include ALL of the published paths, ports, & variables available for Gluetun (set to their defaults) from the upstream project, repo, & wiki; to keep them ALL up-to-date as much as possible; and to include useful Gluetun-Wiki URLs for each config item; all presented in a useful template for the Unraid community.
(Control server login: controlserver, controlserver)
Container.Maintainer: FiddlyRumpus. No relation to Mr. Frumpus.
Container.Changes: ###2026-06-13_02 - Made PIA OpenVPN Encryption Preset advanced. Gluetun v3.41.1 ###2026-06-13_01 - Adding ... Gluetun v3.41.1 ###2026-06-12 - Adding ... and adjusting names. Gluetun v3.41.1 ###2026-06-11 - Adding full names, and ... Gluetun v3.41.1 ###2026-06-10 - Adjusting descriptions. Gluetun v3.41.1 ###2026-06-09 - Rearranged descriptions, testing XML parser. Gluetun v3.41.1 ###2026-06-08 - Initial relase. Gluetun v3.41.1

Config.Name: VPN - Service Provider
Config.Description: REQ: Specify a supported VPN provider to use (Valid VPN provider) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/vpn.md

Config.Name: VPN - Type
Config.Description: REQ: VPN protocol to use. Not all providers support Wireguard. (openvpn or wireguard) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/vpn.md

Config.Name: VPN - Interface
Config.Description: REQ: Specify a custom network interface name to use (Any interface name) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/vpn.md

Config.Name: VPN - Up Command
Config.Description: OPT: Command to run when the VPN connection goes up. You can use the following template variables if needed: {{VPN_INTERFACE}} (Shell command) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/vpn.md

Config.Name: VPN - Down Command
Config.Description: OPT: Command to run when the VPN connection goes down. You can use the following template variables if needed: {{VPN_INTERFACE}} (Shell command) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/vpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - User
Config.Description: REQ: OpenVPN username . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Password
Config.Description: REQ: OpenVPN password . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Protocol
Config.Description: OPT: Network protocol to use, only valid for OpenVPN (udp or tcp) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Version
Config.Description: OPT: Set the OpenVPN version to run (2.5 or 2.6) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Endpoint IP
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a generally optional target VPN server IP address to use (valid IP address) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Endpoint Port
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a generally optional target VPN server port number to use (valid port number) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Verbosity
Config.Description: OPT: OpenVPN verbosity level (0 to 6). . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Flags
Config.Description: OPT: Space delimited OpenVPN flags to pass to openvpn (Openvpn flags) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Root
Config.Description: OPT: Run OpenVPN as root (yes or no) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Ciphers
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a custom cipher to use. It will also set ncp-disable if using AES GCM for PIA (i.e. aes-256-gcm) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Auth
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a custom auth algorithm to use (i.e. sha256) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - MSS Fix
Config.Description: OPT: Set the MSS fix parameter. Set to 0 to use the defaults. (0 to 9999) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Cert
Config.Description: OPT: OpenVPN certificate content ([base64 part only](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/advanced/openvpn-client-certificate.md)) (base64 PEM) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Key
Config.Description: OPT: OpenVPN key ([base64 part only](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/advanced/openvpn-client-encrypted-key.md)) (base64 PEM). . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Encrypted Key
Config.Description: OPT: OpenVPN encrypted key ([base64 part only](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/advanced/openvpn-client-key.md)) (base64 PEM) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Key Passphrase
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a key passphrase to decrypt an encrypted key . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Process User
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a user to run the OpenVPN subprocess (Valid OS user) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: OpenVPN - Custom Config
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a custom OpenVPN configuration file to use for [the custom VPN provider](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/providers/custom.md). (Empty or path to file) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/openvpn.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Private Key
Config.Description: REQ: Wireguard client private key to use. This is usually always needed. (Valid base 58 Wireguard key) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Addresses
Config.Description: REQ: This is usually needed. (Valid IP network interface address in the format xx.xx.xx.xx/xx) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Public Key
Config.Description: REQ/OPT: Wireguard server public key to use. This may or may not be needed. (Valid base 58 Wireguard key) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Endpoint IP
Config.Description: OPT/REQ: Specify a generally optional target VPN server IP address to use (Valid IP address) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Endpoint Port
Config.Description: OPT/REQ: Specify a generally optional target VPN server port number to use (Valid port number) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Preshared Key
Config.Description: OPT: Wireguard pre-shared key (Base64 pre-shared key) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Allowed IPs
Config.Description: OPT: Wireguard peer allowed ips (CSV of IP address ranges) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Implementation
Config.Description: Wireguard implementation to use (auto, kernelspace or userspace) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - MTU
Config.Description: OPT: Wireguard MTU (Any positive value generally up to 1440) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: Wireguard - Persistant Keepalive Interval
Config.Description: OPT: Wireguard persistent keepalive interval (Any duration, for example 25s) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/wireguard.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Private Key
Config.Description: REQ: Amneziawg client private key to use. This is usually always needed. (Valid base 58 Amneziawg key) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Addresses
Config.Description: REQ: This is usually needed. (Valid IP network interface address in the format xx.xx.xx.xx/xx) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Public Key
Config.Description: REQ/OPT: Amneziawg server public key to use. This may or may not be needed. (Valid base 58 Amneziawg key) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Endpoint IP
Config.Description: OPT/REQ: Specify a generally optional target VPN server IP address to use (Valid IP address) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Endpoint Port
Config.Description: OPT/REQ: Specify a generally optional target VPN server port number to use (Valid port number) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Preshared Key
Config.Description: OPT: Amneziawg pre-shared key (Base64 pre-shared key) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Allowed IPs
Config.Description: OPT: Amneziawg peer allowed ips (CSV of IP address ranges) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - MTU
Config.Description: OPT: Amneziawg MTU (Any positive value generally up to 1440, probably lower with Amneziawg) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Persistant Keepalive Interval
Config.Description: OPT: Amneziawg persistent keepalive interval (Any duration, for example 25s) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Junk Count
Config.Description: OPT: Number of junk packets following I1-I5 and sent before the actual handshake initiation (Any positive integer) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Junk Min
Config.Description: OPT: Minimum size in bytes of the random junk data prefixed to the handshake packet (Any positive integer and must be less than or equal to AMNEZIAWG_JMAX) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - Junk Max
Config.Description: OPT: Maximum size in bytes of the random junk data prefixed to the handshake packet (Any positive integer and must be greater than or equal to AMNEZIAWG_JMIN) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - S1
Config.Description: OPT: Random bytes to pad the handshake initiation packets (Any positive integer) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - S2
Config.Description: OPT: Random bytes to pad the handshake response packets (Any positive integer) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - S3
Config.Description: OPT: Random bytes to pad the handshake cookie reply packets (Any positive integer) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - S4
Config.Description: OPT: Random bytes to pad the encrypted transport data packets (Any positive integer) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - H1
Config.Description: OPT: header range of the handshake initiation message (n or range n-m, with values from 0 to 4294967295) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - H2
Config.Description: OPT: header range of the handshake response message (n or range n-m, with values from 0 to 4294967295) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - H3
Config.Description: OPT: header range of the handshake cookie reply message (n or range n-m, with values from 0 to 4294967295) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - H4
Config.Description: OPT: header range of the transport data message (n or range n-m, with values from 0 to 4294967295) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - I1
Config.Description: OPT: See [custom signature packets](https://github.com/amnezia-vpn/amneziawg-go?tab=readme-ov-file#custom-signature-packets) . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - I2
Config.Description: OPT: See [custom signature packets](https://github.com/amnezia-vpn/amneziawg-go?tab=readme-ov-file#custom-signature-packets) . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - I3
Config.Description: OPT: See [custom signature packets](https://github.com/amnezia-vpn/amneziawg-go?tab=readme-ov-file#custom-signature-packets) . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - I4
Config.Description: OPT: See [custom signature packets](https://github.com/amnezia-vpn/amneziawg-go?tab=readme-ov-file#custom-signature-packets) . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: AmneziaWG - I5
Config.Description: OPT: See [custom signature packets](https://github.com/amnezia-vpn/amneziawg-go?tab=readme-ov-file#custom-signature-packets) . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/amneziawg.md

Config.Name: Port Forwarding
Config.Description: OPT: Enable custom port forwarding code for supported providers (off or on) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/port-forwarding.md

Config.Name: Port Forwarding - Provider
Config.Description: OPT: Choose the custom port forwarding code to use. This is useful when using the custom provider with Wireguard. For PIA, make sure you set SERVER_NAMES. (private-internet-access, perfect-privacy, privatevpn, protonvpn) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/port-forwarding.md

Config.Name: Port Forwarding - Ports Count
Config.Description: OPT: Number of TCP+UDP ports to forward. Can be up to 5 for ProtonVPN. (Depends on VPN provider) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/port-forwarding.md

Config.Name: Port Forwarding - Status File
Config.Description: OPT: File path to use for writing the forwarded port obtained. (Valid filepath) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/port-forwarding.md

Config.Name: Port Forwarding - Listening Ports
Config.Description: OPT: Port redirections to redirect incoming traffic to. Do not use with torrent clients. Specify 0 or N ports for VPN_PORT_FORWARDING_PORTS_COUNT=N (Comma separated list of port numbers) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/port-forwarding.md

Config.Name: Port Forwarding - Up Command
Config.Description: OPT: Command to run when port forwarding has finished setting up. (Shell command) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/port-forwarding.md

Config.Name: Port Forwarding - Down Command
Config.Description: OPT: Command to run when port forwarding has finished tearing down. (Shell command) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/port-forwarding.md

Config.Name: Providers - Server Countries
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of countries (USED BY: airvpn, cyberghost, expressvpn, fastestvpn, hidemyass, ipvanish, ivpn, mullvad, nordvpn, privado, privatevpn, protonvpn, purevpn, slickvpn, surfshark, torguard, vpn-unlimited) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers

Config.Name: Providers - Server Regions
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of regions (USED BY: airvpn, giganews, hidemyass, nordvpn, privado, private-internet-access, protonvpn, purevpn, slickvpn, surfshark, vpn-secure, vpn-unlimited, vyprvpn, windscribe) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers

Config.Name: Providers - Server Cities
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of cities (USED BY: airvpn, expressvpn, fastestvpn, hidemyass, ipvanish, ivpn, mullvad, nordvpn, perfect-privacy, privado, privatevpn, protonvpn, purevpn, slickvpn, surfshark, torguard, vpn-secure, vpn-unlimited, windscribe) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers

Config.Name: Providers - Server Names
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of server names (USED BY: airvpn, private-internet-access) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers

Config.Name: Providers - Server Hostnames
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of server hostnames. Beware this is the narrowest filter, so if you set this to a single hostname and this hostname disappears from the Gluetun servers data due to an update, your container will no longer work until this filter is changed. I would suggest avoiding it unless you know this reliability risk. (USED BY: all EXCEPT perfect privacy) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers

Config.Name: Providers - ISP
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of ISPs (USED BY: ivpn, mullvad) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers

Config.Name: Providers - Owned Only
Config.Description: OPT: If the VPN server is owned by Mullvad. It defaults to no, meaning it includes all servers. It can be set to yes. (USED BY: mullvad) . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/mullvad.md

Config.Name: Providers - Server Categories
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of server categories (USED BY: nordvpn) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/nordvpn.md

Config.Name: Providers - Port Forward Only
Config.Description: OPT: Set to true to select servers with port forwarding only. It defaults to false (USED BY: private-internet-access) (true or false) . . . . . . . Filter only port-forwarding enabled (aka p2p) servers by setting it to on. It defaults to off. (USED BY: protonvpn) (off or on) . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers

Config.Name: Providers - Private Internet Access OpenVPN Encryption Preset
Config.Description: OPT: Encryption preset, defaulting to strong, which can be set to normal or strong (USED BY: private-internet-access) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/private-internet-access.md

Config.Name: Providers - Free Only
Config.Description: OPT: Filter only free tier servers by setting it to on. It defaults to off (USED BY: protonvpn) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/protonvpn.md

Config.Name: Providers - Stream Only
Config.Description: OPT: Filter only streaming servers by setting it to on. It defaults to off (USED BY: protonvpn) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/protonvpn.md

Config.Name: Providers - Secure Core Only
Config.Description: OPT: Filter only secure core servers by setting it to on. It defaults to off. (USED BY: protonvpn) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/protonvpn.md

Config.Name: Providers - TOR Only
Config.Description: OPT: Filter only TOR servers by setting it to on. It defaults to off (USED BY: protonvpn) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/protonvpn.md

Config.Name: Providers - Premium Only
Config.Description: OPT: yes or no (USED BY: vpn-secure) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/tree/main/setup/providers/vpn-secure.md

Config.Name: Firewall - VPN Input Ports
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of ports to allow from the VPN server side (i.e. 1000,8080) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/firewall.md

Config.Name: Firewall - Input Ports
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of ports to allow through the default interface. This seems needed for Kubernetes sidecars. (i.e. 1000,8000) . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/firewall.md

Config.Name: Firewall - iptables Log Level
Config.Description: OPT: Sets the log level for iptables commands. Use debug for detailed logging. (debug, info, warn, error) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/firewall.md

Config.Name: Firewall - Outbound Subnets
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated subnets that Gluetun and the containers sharing its network stack are allowed to access. This involves firewall and routing modifications. (i.e. 192.168.1.0/24,192.168.10.121/32,10.0.0.5/28) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/firewall.md

Config.Name: Health Check - Target Addresses
Config.Description: OPT: Addresses to TCP+TLS dial on connection establishment and then every 5 minutes. Extra addresses are used as fallbacks. . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/healthcheck.md

Config.Name: Health Check - ICMP Target IPs
Config.Description: OPT: Addresses to ICMP ping every minute after connection. Extra addresses are used as fallbacks. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/healthcheck.md

Config.Name: Health Check - Server Address
Config.Description: OPT: Internal health check server listening address . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/healthcheck.md

Config.Name: Health Check - Restart VPN
Config.Description: OPT: Auto healing feature. I highly suggest keeping this on. You can keep it off to debug why your connection goes unstable. . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/healthcheck.md

Config.Name: DNS - Upstream Resolver Type
Config.Description: OPT: How to connect to the upstream DNS servers. dot means DNS over TLS, doh means DNS over HTTPS, plain means plain UDP DNS. (dot, doh or plain) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Upstream Resolvers
Config.Description: Comma delimited list of DNS over TLS providers (cira family, cira private, cira protected, cleanbrowsing adult, cleanbrowsing family, cleanbrowsing security, cloudflare, cloudflare family, cloudflare security, google, libredns, opendns, quad9, quad9 secured, quad9 unsecured, quadrant) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Block IPs
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of IP addresses to not resolve public domains to. (Any valid IP address) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Block IP Prefixes
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of CIDRs to not resolve public domains to. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Rebinding Protection Protection Exempt Hostnames
Config.Description: OPT: Public domain names to exclude from DNS rebinding protection (Comma separated list of public domain names) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Update Period
Config.Description: OPT: Period to update block lists and cryptographic files and restart Unbound. Set to 0 to deactivate updates. (i.e. 0, 30s, 5m, 24h) . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Block Malicious
Config.Description: OPT: Block malicious hostnames and IPs (on, off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Block Surveillance
Config.Description: OPT: Block surveillance hostnames and IPs (on, off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Block Ads
Config.Description: OPT: Block ads hostnames and IPs (on, off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Unblock Hostnames
Config.Description: OPT: Comma separated list of domain names to leave unblocked from the filtering (i.e. domain1.com,x.domain2.co.uk) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: DNS - Upstream Plain Addresses
Config.Description: OPT: (Warning: prefer NOT using this) If set, the internal DNS server will forward queries to the addresses specified over plaintext. Ideally do NOT use the VPN provider DNS, see why [here](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md#warning-on-dns_upstream_plain_addresses). If you set this to a private IP address on your Docker bridge network or your LAN, your DNS queries will leak out of the VPN tunnel! (Comma separated list of ip:port addresses) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/dns.md

Config.Name: HTTP Proxy
Config.Description: OPT: Enable the internal HTTP proxy (on,off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/http-proxy.md

Config.Name: HTTP Proxy - Log
Config.Description: OPT: Logs every tunnel requests . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/http-proxy.md

Config.Name: HTTP Proxy - Listening Address
Config.Description: OPT: Internal listening address for the HTTP proxy (A listening address) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/http-proxy.md

Config.Name: HTTP Proxy - User
Config.Description: OPT: Username to use to connect to the HTTP proxy . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/http-proxy.md

Config.Name: HTTP Proxy - Password
Config.Description: OPT: Password to use to connect to the HTTP proxy . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/http-proxy.md

Config.Name: HTTP Proxy - Stealth
Config.Description: OPT: Stealth mode means HTTP proxy headers are not added to your requests . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/http-proxy.md

Config.Name: Shadowsocks
Config.Description: OPT: Enable the internal Shadowsocks proxy (on,off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/shadowsocks.md

Config.Name: Shadowsocks - Log
Config.Description: OPT: Enable Shadowsocks logging (on,off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/shadowsocks.md

Config.Name: Shadowsocks - Listening Address
Config.Description: OPT: Internal listening address for Shadowsocks (Listening address) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/shadowsocks.md

Config.Name: Shadowsocks - Password
Config.Description: OPT: Password to use to connect to Shadowsocks . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/shadowsocks.md

Config.Name: Shadowsocks - Cipher
Config.Description: OPT: AEAD Cipher to use for Shadowsocks . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/shadowsocks.md

Config.Name: Control Server - Address
Config.Description: OPT: Listening address for the HTTP control server (Valid listening address) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/control-server.md

Config.Name: Control Server - Log
Config.Description: OPT: Enable logging of HTTP requests (on or off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/control-server.md

Config.Name: Control Server - Auth Config Filepath
Config.Description: OPT: Path to a TOML file containing authentication configuration (Valid path) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/control-server.md

Config.Name: Control Server - Auth Default Role
Config.Description: ADV: For the lazies not willing to setup a configuration file (Valid JSON string) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/advanced/control-server.md

Config.Name: Updater - Prefer Direct Download
Config.Description: OPT: Whether to prefer direct download of servers data from [gluetun-servers](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-servers/tree/main/pkg/servers), instead of using the Gluetun code to fetch, parse and process servers data. This is notably faster and more reliable, but defaults to no to avoid breaking compatibility. (yes or no) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/updater.md

Config.Name: Updater - Period
Config.Description: OPT: Period to update the VPN servers data in memory and to /gluetun/servers/. Set to 0 to disable. This does a burst of DNS over HTTPs requests, which may be blocked if you set BLOCK_MALICIOUS=on for example. (Valid duration string such as 480h) . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/updater.md

Config.Name: Updater - Min Ratio
Config.Description: OPT: Ratio of servers to be found for the update to succeed, compared to the servers already built in the program (Ratio between 0 (excluded) and 1) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/updater.md

Config.Name: Updater - Service Providers
Config.Description: OPT: List of providers to update servers data for, when the updater triggers periodically. If left empty, it defaults to the current VPN provider used at start. (Any valid VPN provider name) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/updater.md

Config.Name: Updater - ProtonVPN Email
Config.Description: OPT: If you need paid servers data, you must use a paid account. Otherwise I recommend creating a free throwaway account for this. (Your Proton email) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/updater.md

Config.Name: Updater - ProtonVPN Password
Config.Description: OPT: If you need paid servers data, you must use a paid account. Otherwise I recommend creating a free throwaway account for this. (Your Proton password) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/updater.md

Config.Name: Others - Log Level
Config.Description: OPT: Set the logging level verbosity (debug,info,warn,error) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - Timezone
Config.Description: OPT: Specify a [timezone](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones#List) to use to have correct log times (i.e. Europe/London) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - PUID
Config.Description: OPT: User ID to run as non root and for ownership of files written (1000) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - PGID
Config.Description: OPT: Group ID to run as non root and for ownership of files written (1000) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - Public IP Enabled
Config.Description: OPT: Check for public IP address information on VPN connection (true,false) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - Public IP API
Config.Description: OPT: Public IP echo service API to use or an echoip URL in the form echoip#https://xyz (ipinfo,ifconfigco,ip2location,cloudflare or custom URL) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - Public IP Token
Config.Description: OPT: Optional API token for the public IP echo service to increase rate limiting . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - Public IP File
Config.Description: OPT: Filepath to store the public IP address assigned. This will be removed in the v4 program, instead you might want to use the [control server](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/advanced/control-server.md) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - Version Information
Config.Description: OPT: Logs a message indicating if a newer version is available once the VPN is connected (on,off) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Others - Boring Poll Gluetun[dot]com
Config.Description: OPT: Fight AI slop and help the Gluetun community by [polling periodically every few minutes a 500KB file](https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun/blob/master/internal/boringpoll/boringpoll.go) from gluetun[dot]com to make it unsustainable to host due to egress costs. (off,on) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/others.md

Config.Name: Storage - Enabled
Config.Description: OPT: Enable or disable reading and writing servers to disk (yes or no) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/storage.md

Config.Name: Storage - Directory Path
Config.Description: OPT: Path to the directory where server files are stored (Valid directory path) . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . https://github.com/qdm12/gluetun-wiki/blob/main/setup/options/storage.md
